items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — OneTigris Brand Video Production**

We're shooting a 2-day commercial video campaign for **OneTigris** (onetigris.com), a leading tactical outdoor gear brand, and we're looking for talented on-camera performers in the **Los Angeles area**!

📅 **Shoot Days: May 2 & May 3** — you must be available for BOTH days to apply.

**🟠 ROLE 1 — MAIN TALENT (Male)** 📋 1 spot | Mid-20s to mid-30s | Paid
* Primary on-camera presence across all brand videos
* Must be comfortable and confident on camera
* Capable of handling tactical/outdoor gear scenes
* Athletic, active look that fits an outdoor lifestyle brand
* Commercial or brand experience a plus

⏱ **May 2:** Full day (~10 hrs) | **May 3:** Partial day (~6 hrs) 💰 **Rate: $300 per half-day**

**🟠 ROLE 2 — SUPPORTING TALENT (Female)** 📋 1 spot | Mid-20s to mid-30s | Paid
* Background and supporting roles (gym, security, lifestyle scenes)
* Split-screen and contrast shots with main talent
* Hand model shots featuring gear and accessories
* Pickup and coverage footage
* Easygoing, versatile, collaborative on set

⏱ **May 2:** Partial day (~6–8 hrs) | **May 3:** Partial day (~3–4 hrs) 💰 **Rate: $200 per half-day**

**🟠 Background Performers** 1–2 additional background performers may be needed. 💰 **Rate: $200 per half-day**

⚠️ **Please only apply if you are available for BOTH May 2 and May 3.** We are unable to accommodate partial availability for these roles.

**📩 TO APPLY, email casting@rarefloweragency.com:** 

✔ Your name & contact info 

✔ 2–3 recent photos (including one full-body) 

✔ Brief bio or any on-camera/commercial experience 

✔ Confirmation that you're available May 2 & 3

items.text:
CASTING CALL - SPANISH ACTRESSES
Hi, I’m Lucia, a Spanish film student in Berlin, planning my upcoming bachelor project, and I’m looking for a two Spanish actresses to collaborate with.

ABOUT THE FILM:

‘Las cosas se mueven en mi casa’ (‘Things are moving in my house’) is a B.A. graduation short film directed by Lucía Gil (www.luciagildp.com). It stems from the feeling of ‘in-betweenness’ that a young Spanish woman feels in Berlin - not fully feeling at home in Germany, but losing the anchor to her Spanish family, as she spends more time apart from them.

ABOUT THE ROLES:

- Abril (main role): 20-28 y/o

- Pilar (Abril’s mother): 50-70 y/o

NATIVE SPANISH IS REQUIRED.

PROJECT INFOS:

Shooting dates: 2-3 days between 1st-11th June

This is a no-budget student film, unpaid. 

Food and drinks will be provided on set, as well as good vibes 🙂

The film will be submitted to festivals.

If you are interested in one of the roles, please text me ! luciagilsuarez@gmail.com or @filmbylusi (ig).🫶🏼

items.text:
CGTV question 
Did anyone take their kid to a CGTV audition and not get a callback saying they were picked as one of the 50?

My daughter got called back and told she was one of the few but I was just wondering if they say that to everyone.

topComments.text: Scam. Everyone gets invited back your a paying customer. You can self submit to agencies for free. It should never cost you anything to get in front of an agent. Go on the sag list and self submit for free! CGTV, Barbizon, ipop, etc are all unnecessary cash grabs that target unsuspecting parents.
It’s a scam, everyone gets invited, and they charge huge fees for kids’ representation.

items.text:
I thought I lacked talent, until I realized this is why I lose confidence on camera
Master self tape for film and series with pro-level lighting, framing, eyeline and sound without expensive gear. Learn the exact techniques casting directors notice and start booking more roles with confidence.
There is a moment most actors do not talk about. You hit record. You start strong. Then halfway through the scene, something shifts. Your voice tightens. Your body stiffens. You forget what you practiced and suddenly, your self tape does not feel like you anymore. If you have ever wondered, “Why do I freeze during self-tapes?” you are not alone.
Here is the truth most acting advice skips: it is not just about technique. It is about control. Confidence. Presence under pressure. I have seen actors in Nairobi and beyond deliver incredible rehearsals then completely lose it the second the camera turns on. Not because they lack talent but because no one taught them how to translate that talent on camera.
Just before: Overthinking. Awkward eyelines. Flat energy. After: Grounded presence. Clear choices. Camera ready confidence.
The difference? A system. A repeatable way to approach self tapes for film and series that removes guesswork from lighting and framing to performance and mindset. Casting directors are not just watching what you do. They are feeling how real it is. Here is the shift: They do not hire the most talented actor, they hire the most believable one.
So what is actually happening when confidence drops?
. You are trying to “get it right” instead of living truthfully. 
. Your setup distracts you instead of supporting you. 
. Your focus shifts from the character to yourself.
That is the silent killer of great auditions. 
This is why mastering self tape for film and series https://payhip.com/b/zC2cY is not optional anymore, it is your competitive edge.
If you are ready to stop guessing and start showing up like the actor you know you can be. There is a simple, practical way to fix this step by step.
You do not need more talent. You need a better system. “Free Self Tape Guide for Actors in Kenya — Fix Your Auditions Today”: https://eu.docworkspace.com/d/sIIiN9uCuAar7u8UG?sa=601.1074

That’s not motivation.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LONDON 🎭

We’re casting for a new character-led digital series.

We’re looking for a strong on-camera personality to take on a unique, recurring role in an upcoming content project focused on education, entertainment, and storytelling.

---

THE ROLE:

A highly engaging, slightly over-the-top “educator” type.

Think:

- The teacher who gets way too excited about their subject  

- The expert who can’t help but overshare fascinating (and sometimes slightly disturbing) facts  

- A curious, energetic “genius” with a playful, unpredictable edge  

You’re not a dry academic – you’re the kind of person who:

- Leans in

- Speaks with intensity

- Uses your hands, face, and voice to pull people in

There should be a balance of:

- Authority (we believe you know your stuff)

- Entertainment (we want to keep watching you)

---

WE’RE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO:

- Has strong, natural presence on camera  

- Can deliver lines OR improvise confidently  

- Is highly expressive (facial expressions, body language, voice)  

- Is comfortable being slightly exaggerated without becoming cartoonish  

- Can hook attention within the first 2–3 seconds  

- Feels modern, relatable, and “scroll-stopping”  

Bonus (not required):

- Experience with short-form content (TikTok / Reels / Shorts)  

- Background in comedy, presenting, or improv  

---

DETAILS:

- Paid role (day/hour rate – to be agreed)  

- London-based (or able to travel)  

- Part-time to start, with strong potential to become a steady, long-term role and possibly full-time  

---

CASTING PROCESS:

Send us a short self-tape (30–60 seconds) where you:

1. Introduce yourself  

2. Teach us something simple (ANY topic)  

   – but do it like you’re way more excited about it than you probably should be  

   – make it engaging, fast-paced, and slightly intense  

We’re not looking for perfection – we’re looking for:

energy, presence, personality, and memorability

---

SEND YOUR SUBMISSION TO:  

casting@mouldlab.uk  

Subject line: Casting – London

---

We’ll be reviewing submissions on a rolling basis and inviting selected candidates to in-person casting sessions in London.

Good luck 🎬

topComments.text: Haha! This is literally me! (Drama teacher / actor). Have saved the post and will apply!

i will be submitting a tape ! sounds right up my street as i've also lectured for the london college of fashion, where i used to take students out in london & give engaging talks. plus i've hosted pub quizzes

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL

Purple Dreams Productions are casting the lead character in our upcoming play.

‘MURDER AT…’
There’s a killer in the cast! Comedy turns to tragedy as a murderer reveals themselves… but who will be their first victim?

This play is a psychological drama, based around a cast of actors as they put on a series of plays at their local theatre. 

We have 2 booked dates locked in at different venues, with the potential for more as new bookings come in.

29th May - Murder at the Quay Theatre
13th June - Murder at Cheltenham Playhouse

We’ve previously toured this play in Brentwood, Faversham, Lowestoft, Sittingbourne, Wickenby, Thame and Sleaford to great responses, and are looking forward to taking it to new audiences. 

Rehearsals will take place in Hunstanton (PE36) and will be as flexible as possible to work around previous commitments.

If you’re interested in joining our warm and friendly group, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. Contact me via a DM on here, or at purple-dreams@hotmail.co.uk 

Many thanks 
Tobias Nicholls 
Creative Director 
Purple Dreams Productions

items.text: Cześć, szukamy do prostej roli na półtorej dnia **dwójki** aktorów w wieku około **26-32 lat**. Zdjęcia w okolicy **Trójmiasta**. Role nie mówione, do małej, ale artystycznej ambitnej reklamy. Szukamy tzw. **normalsów**, nie modeli. Wynagrodzenie 900 zł. Proszę o zgłaszanie się osób tylko z okolic i proszę przesłać swoje aktualne zdjęcia ew. link do portfolio. **7-8 maja.**

items.text:
Casting Call: Middle-Aged Female Actor (Short Film)
Hello!

I’m currently casting for a short film that follows a mother and daughter reuniting at the daughter’s flat after six months apart. It’s an intimate, fly-on-the-wall chamber drama, shot entirely inside a London flat on a very small budget.

**The role: **
* Mother (playing age 50–60)
* Warm, complex, emotionally grounded character

I have already cast the daughter, who is Welsh, so a Welsh actor would be ideal for authenticity but this is not essential.

**Shoot dates: **TBC, likely within the next few months.

**Location:** A flat in Bow, London.

**Please note: this is an unpaid role, but it’s a strong character piece and will be a great collaborative experience.**

If you’re interested or would like more details, feel free to DM me!

Thanks so much.

sharedPost.text:
आज के समय में हम प्यार कम… control ज़्यादा करते हैं…
और वहीं से शुरू होती है दूरी, दर्द और गलतफहमियां…

सच्चा प्यार किसी एक रिश्ते तक सीमित नहीं होता —
वो मां-बाप, भाई-बहन, पार्टनर… हर रिश्ते में बहता है ❤️

👉 प्यार करो… लेकिन बिना डर
👉 साथ रहो… लेकिन बिना control
👉 जुड़ो… लेकिन बिना खोए खुद को

क्योंकि सच्चा प्यार बांधता नहीं… आज़ाद करता है 💫

#FearlessLove #LimitlessLove #RealLove #FamilyLove #PureLove

items.text:
CASTING CALL – VIDEO / FASHION COLLABORATION – BERLIN
Hi! My name is Hanna and I’m a producer based in Berlin, currently working on a fashion video editorial in collaboration with Naomi Tarazi. 

We are shooting with a professional production team in a Berlin hotel location.

Looking for:
– Female model
– East / Southeast Asian appearance
– Slim build, strong natural presence
– Comfortable in front of camera (video & stills)

Concept:
A clean, intimate hotel setting with a slightly awkward, off-balance mood. Focus on body lines, movement, and subtle, unconventional posing.

Mood:
– minimal
– quiet
– slightly strange / cinematic
– feminine but not overly polished

Styling:
Naomi Tarazi garments (sculptural silhouettes, tights, textures) + mix of minimalistic clothes and designer pieces 

HMU:
Natural skin, simple hair (straight / tied)

Shooting:
– within the next month
– Berlin (hotel location)
– professional crew on set (production studio)

You will receive:
THIS IS AN UNPAID POSITION
– professional video material + edited images for your portfolio

Moodboard attached

If you feel aligned with this aesthetic, please DM me or comment with your portfolio / Instagram and I’ll end you more details✨

Or reach me by this Email Address: hanna@nusual.studio
Selected models may be considered for future collaborations

items.text:
Требуются 2 танцовщицы в шоу балет в Турцию — город Кушадасы! 🇹🇷

Мы работаем с отелями

предоставляем:
✨ Проживание
✨ Питание
✨ Рабочую визу
✨ Авиабилеты в обе стороны
✨ Трансфер на работу
✨ Сценические костюмы

items.text:
CASTING CALL – INDEPENDENT SHORT FILM "NOAH"
Synopsis: Noah, a 13-year-old boy from Western Sydney, lives in a broken home with an alcoholic, abusive father and a mother in prison. He tries to escape his family by seeking belonging with his two friends – even though he knows they don't truly care. When his father is taken away by police, Noah finds himself completely unsupervised. He drifts toward a reckless street gang, starts buying vapes, and loses his innocence for good.

Shooting Location: Sydney / Western Sydney

Shooting Dates: 4 days within the first week of May (exact dates TBC, to be arranged with cast availability)

LOOKING FOR:

1.THOMAS (Supporting)Male 12–16

Role: Noah's other friend. He talks behind Noah's back and makes mean comments about his family. Not evil – just casually cruel and unaware of the damage he causes.

2. TOBY (Small role)Male40+

Role: A customer in a tobacco shop. He catches Noah trying to steal a vape and confronts him briefly. Only one scene.

3. FATHER (Likely voice-only role)40+

Voice requirement: Rough, gruff, powerful

4. Few boys aged 14–16; no acting experience required, and there are no lines.

What we offer:

Low‑budget student / independent film

Copy, credit, and meals on set

It will be submitted to major international film festivals

All minors must have parental/guardian consent and supervision on set

How to apply:

Send the following to jili3742@uni.sydney.edu.au

Recent photo (headshot or full body)

Age and location

Showreel

For FATHER role: Please send a voice note (or short video) of you yelling 1–2 lines (e.g., “Where are you?!”, “You worthless piece of –”) to show your vocal range.

Deadline: 01/05/2026

Shooting dates: 4 days within the first week of May (exact dates to be confirmed)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎2/7Y40 2/7 K M FESTIVAL DE CANNES 2022 OFFICIAL NOH H DIRECTED DIRECTEDBYJIAYI BY JIAYI LI GORGEOUS AND GORGEOUSANDTENDERTA TENDERT TENDERTAL TALE OODFRENDSHIR :000F CanN ANEXCEPTIONALF FILMOF TREMENDOUSEMPATHYA و TREMENDOUSE EMPATHY සമර: EDEN GUSTAV DAMBRINE DE WAELE 組讯眼如 NEENS 事。H///NI ÉMILIE DEQUENNE รรพ お電.で LÉA DRUCKER yOPETH‎'‎

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL🎬

We’re currently looking to expand our casting with more ethnically diverse individuals aged 50+ for an upcoming production.

We need more diversity to reflect real life London. This is a fantastic opportunity to be part of a professional set and a key continuity-based shoot.

📅 DATES-  Monday 18th May – Friday 22nd May
⏰ Hours: 07:00 – 18:00 each day
📍 Location: Cardiff 

⚠️ IMPORTANT: This is a continuity booking, so you must be available for all dates listed.

💷 Rate: Equity PACT (est. £128.69 + £4 travel, potential overtime) 

👉 You can apply directly via our jobs board if you match the brief. 

👉 Don’t forget—you can list multiple locations on your profile if you’re available to work across different areas. So if you’re based in London but have another base in Cardiff then this could be suitable as it’s 5 days work! 

If you (or someone you know) fit the brief and can fully commit, we’d love to hear from you. Please apply or tag someone who might be perfect for this!

Direct application is here-

Kamedstudio

items.text:
Do krótkometrażowego projektu filmowego poszukuję 2-3 osób, do scen przedstawiających chodzenie boso po różnych nawierzchniach (żwir, ruiny, asfalt, kamienie itp.), także w miejscach publicznych.
Do krótkometrażowego projektu filmowego poszukuję 2-3 osób, do scen przedstawiających chodzenie boso po różnych nawierzchniach (żwir, ruiny, asfalt, kamienie itp.), także w miejscach publicznych.

Warunki i wymagania :

•Czas trwania: max 4 dni zdjęciowe (praca po 3-4 godziny dziennie) 

•Rozmiar stopy- do 39

•Dobra kondycja fizyczna i odporność na zmienne warunki atmosferyczne

•Doświadczenie nie jest wymagane. 

Wynagrodzenie:

do 1000 zł netto za każdy dzień zdjęciowy (w zależności od liczby zrealizowanych ujęć i czasu pracy)

Umowa: zlecenie (wypłaty systemem dniówkowym) 

Po więcej informacji zapraszam do kontaktu w wiadomości prywatnej.

Skontaktujemy się wyłącznie z wybranymi osobami.

items.text:
Cześć jestem siedemnastoletnim biegaczem długodystansowym który zajmuje się montażem krótkich formatów od rolek po reklamy. Nie ukrywam że jest to początek mojej półprofesjonalnej przygody montażowej, lecz niech cię to nie zwiedzie - hobbystycznie montowałem już od jakiegoś czasu ale dopiero teraz zdecydowałem się tą pasje przekuć w coś więcej. Więc jeżeli zdecydujesz sie na współpracę ze mną napisz komentarz pod postem o treści “Wow” a to ja się do ciebie odezwę. Pamietaj również, że będzie to dla mnie duża pomoc w dalszym rozwoju montażowo-biegowym. Pozdrawiam twój przyszły montażysta. 
Moje umiejętności:

https://www.instagram.com/reel/DXRQDFkEpcr/?igsh=NXhwcGVyYnY5dHc5

items.text:
Cześć! Poszukiwany aktor do roli rycerza-kibola. Trójmiasto. 4-8 maja. 
Wiek: do ok. 35 lat

Wygląd: łysy lub z długimi włosami; broda również mile widziana; bardziej masywny niż nie 

Ogólna aparycja: groźny, średniowieczny kibol/dres, ale w głębi duszy ma miękkie serducho

Charakterystyka postaci: Jarosław - starszy z braci, wielki patriota, dla którego pójście na bitwę pod Grunwaldem jest prawie tak ważne jak dla kibola pójście na ustawkę po meczu Lechii Gdańsk – jednak w naszym uniwersum jest to zagorzały fan Korony Polsko-Litewskiej, zmarły ojciec jest dla niego największym autorytetem, ogólnie trochę myślą nieskalany, ale w sumie to dobry chłopak, dzień dobry mówi w osadzie, jedyne pole, na którym może się wykazać to pole bitwy.

O filmie: Bóg, gluten, ojczyzna to krótkometrażowa kostiumowa komedia oraz jednocześnie film dyplomowy studentów III roku Produkcji Form Audiowizualnych Uniwersytetu Gdańskiego. Akcja dzieje się w (bardzo) umownej średniowiecznej Polsce. Historia opowiada o drodze dwóch braci – Jarka i Jarosława na bitwę pod Grunwaldem, na którą wezwanie dostali z rocznym opóźnieniem (ale tego dowiadują się dopiero na końcu – kochana poczta polska;). Cały film wypełniony jest gagami i humorem inspirowanym m.in. 1670 oraz Monty Pythonem. 

Zainteresowanych proszę o kontakt w komentarzu lub wiadomości prywatnej. Chętnie porozmawiam, odpowiem na wszelkie pytania lub opowiem coś więcej o filmie i samej roli. 

Powiedziałabym, że oferta non-profit, ale zapewniamy oczywiście wspaniałą zabawę, jedzonko oraz dozgonną wdzięczność za pomoc biednym studentom w zrealizowaniu ich projektu dyplomowego.

Pozdrawiam ciepło, Julia – kierowniczka produkcji BGO.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Bóg glutengczyzna gluten ojczyzna'

May be a graphic of text that says 'Logtine Kiedy dwaj bracia, rycerze -kiboli i niespetniony piekarz, w wyruszają na wyprawę, aby wziąć udział w bitwie pod Grunwaldem, tak naprawdę idą na bitwę ze swoimi "tatusiowymi problemami".'

May be an image of text that says 'Bóg gluten, ojczyzna Tragikomiczny film drogi osadzony w groteskowej, umownej wersji średniowiecznej Polski. Opowiada historię dwóch braci: Jarka cichego marzyciela przygotowującego się do egzaminu na piekarza, oraz Jarosława dumnego wojownika żyjącego mitem chwaty poległego ojca. Nagte powołanie do wojska brutalnie przerywa ich codzienność. Dla Jarosława wojna jest spetnieniem przeznaczenia, dla Jarka końcem marzeń spokojnym życiu. Mimo strachu Jarek wyrusza droge razem bratem Ich wędrówka na Grunwald staje się serią absurdalnych spotkań, które stopniowo obnażają bezsens wojny falsz wielkich słów o honorze. „Bóg, gluten, ojczyzna" to opowieść ၀ dorastaniu, braterskiej więzi ¡odwadze wyboru własnej drogi zamiast cudzych mitów,'

topComments.text: Dzień dobry napisałem na priv pewnie jest w innych .
Wstępnie mógłbym być zainteresowany ale miałbym nieco pytań

items.text:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy **

**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

**Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** meets

- **Organic Breathing** & **Image Work**

- **Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre** (Kerala, India) 

- **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 

- **The Actor’s Energy and Presence **

- **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: **Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark; **Remith Ramesh**, India; **Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey; **Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey; **Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia; **Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany; and guest artists from Southern Africa, USA, Singapore, and India 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS **

This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**

There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 

The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/

Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

🎬 نیو ٹیلنٹ کی تلاش! 🌟

items.text:
CASTING URGENT 

Dans le cadre d’un tournage pour une vidéo YouTube autour du rapport des Français à l’argent, nous recherchons des personnes âgées de 40 à 99 ans pour participer à une courte interview.

Concept :
L’objectif est de recueillir des témoignages sincères dans le cadre d’une expérience sociologique.

Lieu : Île-de-France (Ivry-sur-Seine)
Date : 29/30/31 avril
Durée : 10 à 20 minutes maximum
Projet rémunéré

Aucune expérience face caméra n’est requise, il suffit d’être à l’aise pour s’exprimer 😊

📩 Pour candidater : envoyez un mail à skcontrat@gmail.com

items.title: Casting Call London (UK)

items.text:
CASTING CALL - TRAVEL AND FOOD PAID 

One Day Filming on August 1st - West Yorkshire 

**ROLES (Authentic Yorkshire Accents Required)**

**Cory**

Early 20's, funny, kind, and a beloved friend. But tonight, Cory feels like he doesn't live up to any of those traits. Everyone around him is having a good time, but he's struggling to connect. Nature calls, and Cory's need to use the urinals is stalled by an unashamed, half drunk, local bar fly. 

**‘The Man’**

Only known as 'The Man', probably around 40 to 60 years of age, he's your local pub's number 1 fan. The regulars may describe him as larger than life, or crass and rude, depending on who you ask. The Man finds himself having casual urinal talk to a timid 20 year old just trying to get through the day.

**Compensation **

Transport and food will be covered. This is a microbudget short film.

 Send your CV/showreel to:* analog.studios@outlook.com*
 Subject line: *Urinal Casting*

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Urinal SIGUATIONAL COMEDY SHORT FILM ABOИT THE FILM Cory, an anxious introvert is left alone in the toilets with a boozed-up bar fly. The only way out is to conquer his stage fright and use the urinal. The pressure is on. ROLES Lead: male, early 20's Support: male, 40's-50's 40's 50's Shoot date: Saturday 1st August'

Only known as 'The Man', probably around 40 to 60 years of age, he's your local pub's number 1 fan. The regulars may describe him as larger than life, or crass and rude, depending on who you ask. The Man finds himself having casual urinal talk to a timid 20 year old just trying to get through the day.

**Compensation **

Transport and food will be covered. This is a microbudget short film.

 Send your CV/showreel to:* analog.studios@outlook.com*
 Subject line: *Urinal Casting*

Casting for new talent
Hi, I am starting a video/filmmaking business and putting together COMEDY samples for Youtube and to promote the business.

I need actors, comedians for a few simple scenes.  No experience required (although helpful).  Must be professional and reliable. 

1. To play a wild pharmacist.  Male or female talent.  Ages 25-45 Should be corporate looking with an edge, such as wild hair, tattoos, etc.   
2. To play a comedy Lucifer character.  Male or female.  Prefer age 30-50  The wilder looking and more evil you can appear, the better.  Must have a sense of humor.

I will probably need 20-40 minutes of your time.  This is a great way to get some experience and start your acting career.

No pay, but you will get copy of the video, stills photos, credit and experience.

You can email a few photos and information to 1allancastle@gmail.com  

Thank you.  Allan

🎬 CASTING CALL – Between Two Lives
An Independent Short Film

A Solkem Studios Film

        Hello,

I’m currently casting for my upcoming short film Between Two Lives, a character-driven story exploring identity, growth, and the tension between past and future. This is my second film project, and I’m looking for actors who are passionate about storytelling and want to collaborate on a meaningful project.

      MARCUS (Supporting Role)

Male, mids–late 20s

Charismatic, outgoing, natural comedic presence

Represents comfort and familiarity in Jordan’s lifestyle

Strong in group scenes and natural dialogue delivery

  ANDRE (Supporting Role)

Male, mid–late 20s

Calm, grounded, observant presence

Delivers lines with subtle emotional depth

Represents clarity and truth within the friend group

📍 Filming Location: Aurora & Denver, Colorado

📅 Shoot Dates: July 10–12, 2026

🎬 Production: Independent Film

💰 Compensation: Will provide food/snack/Drinks: This is an unpaid project, created for:

Reel or past work (if available)

Contact information

📧 Email: reinesolkem101@gmail.com

📱 Phone: 720-572-0029

Looking for actors who are serious, reliable, and excited to help bring a strong story to life.

## ** CASTING CALL – MADDIE (LEAD)**

**Project: Short-form legal comedy web series**
**Location: Denver**
**Compensation: Unpaid (strong reel footage, recurring role)**
**Shoot Dates: [July / flexible]**

** MADDIE (Lead / Recurring)**

**Female, mid-20s to late 30s **

Confident, expressive, and just slightly unhinged.

Maddie is a lawyer who doesn’t quite *act* like one. She says absurd things with total conviction.. Think *Legally Blonde energy*—but less polished, more chaotic.

Charming. Unpredictable. Fully believes her own logic—even when it makes no sense.

To submit:

- Headshot (or recent photo)

- Short clip (if you have one) OR quick intro video

DM me.

items.text:
# Chasing Shadows - Pilot Episode
--

Seeking cast & crew for an online TV show adaptation of a novel, "Chasing Shadows," a crime/thriller/romance centred around Astrid Clarke, an English FBI agent, who is put on a case surrounding a gang who have the FBI chasing their tails. She is forced to choose where her loyalties lie when her brother is revealed to be in the gang, too.

---

UNPAID - Do not apply if you live outside of Cambridgeshire, as production can’t guarantee travel will be covered at this time. A fundraiser will be created, and travel reimbursements will be discussed among the producer/director, should the target be hit. Depending on how much the fundraiser raises, anything left will be discussed between the producer and director as to payment, dependent on role significance.

Once filming has finished, an IMDB page will be created, and everyone will receive a credit. Food will also be sorted on set, all vegetarian-friendly to avoid dietary issues (unless specifically requested)

---

Shoots in June or early July (to avoid the summer holidays in the UK) within the Cambridgeshire area. Exact locations and dates TBD.

---

This DOES NOT apply to crew. The process is this: Prescreen, Script exert, Chem test, offer. Usually, within a week of each stage. Any communication would take place via Zoom :-)

Please include your location (e.g., Ely/Cambridge/Peterborough) and your availability for June/July. Production estimates a maximum of one week to shoot. A schedule will be created shortly for definitive dates.

--

Full listing info (including character specifics) here: https://www.backstage.com/casting/chasing-shadows-pilot-episode-3151533/?role_id=5524378&role_id=5524373&role_id=5524369

Ich baue aktuell gemeinsam mit meinem Team ein österreichweites Filmnetzwerk auf – und das Ganze wächst gerade extrem:

👉 Über 450 Mitglieder aus ganz Österreich sind schon dabei.

Die Community bringt Filmemacher, Schauspieler und Filmcrews zusammen – mit einem klaren Ziel:
Leute vernetzen & Projekte wirklich umsetzen.

Was dich dort erwartet:

🎬 Crew Calls für Filmprojekte
🎭 Casting Calls für Schauspieler:innen
🤝 Kooperationen & neue Kontakte
🎥 Behind-the-Scenes & Einblicke
💡 Austausch, Tipps & Hilfe aus der Praxis

Egal ob du gerade anfängst oder schon Erfahrung hast – wenn du Bock auf Film hast, bist du hier richtig.

⚠️ Wichtig:
Das Ganze ist komplett kostenlos und lebt von aktiven Leuten.

Freu mich auf dich 🙌🎬

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors ready to build a working career (not just train)?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys (directed by Clint Eastwood) and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been so grateful for the wave of interest and messages recently. It’s been amazing connecting with so many of you.

I’m now offering something I wish existed when I was starting out:

A 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

One of the biggest frustrations I hear is this:
Actors are told “get an agent” but then once they have one, nothing happens.
And for many actors, the challenge is figuring out how to get an agent in the first place.

This session is designed for both.

We sit down and go through:
• What actually makes an actor book work (beyond just talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• The materials you really need and what most actors get wrong
• How to approach auditions and self-tapes strategically
• Building a career that moves forward, not just sideways

You’ll leave with a clear, actionable plan so you’re not stuck wondering when the next audition is coming or why you’re not booking. You’ll know exactly what steps to take to create the career you want. 

If you’ve been feeling stuck or unsure, feel free to message me for details or to book.

May his gentle soul rest in perfect peace 🕊️🕯️

items.text:
AUDITIONS FOR A MUSICAL
Hi, we’re a group of LACC students putting up a show for Fringe Festival. 

MILCH is an absurdist musical comedy. Hidden behind a secret entrance lies the city’s most exclusive speakeasy, a sanctuary for powerful men who trade their dignity for a bottle, shedding their suits and sanity to wail like infants for a taste of breastmilk. When a sudden knock from a surprise guest threatens their business, the girls must create a facade to mislead him. 

Created by three costume designers, this project is driven by a strong visual language and an interest in building something bold, unsettling, and darkly humorous. The work explores themes of labor, power, and the economics of intimacy within a predatory system.

We’re looking for collaborators who are reliable, open to experimentation, and excited to build something unconventional from the ground up.

CASTING

* Milkmaids (Female Lead Vocalists)

Strong singers with stage presence

Comfortable with stylized, physical performance

Movement experience preferred

* Drag Performer (Male, Queer Role)

Strong vocalist and confident mover

Drag experience is a plus

Bold character work and comedic timing

* Clients (Male Ensemble) 

Older age preferred 

Basic singing and movement required

Strong character presence

Comfortable with physical storytelling

* Madame (Middle-Aged Woman)

Strong vocalist with commanding stage presence

Authority figure role

————————————

Musicals for inspiration: Chicago, Cabaret, Burlesque  

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1agnIO7oYjestGIwMfS2hKmL_rvLU4TtZvs5by72KR80/edit?usp=drivesdk

items.text:
CASTING CALL (Seattle, WA)

Dates: May 9 and 10 (Seattle, WA)

Character Details:

ADAM (13-18) - Adam puts all his trust into his sister, but when asked to lie, his morals cause him to question her.

Film Synopsis:

"Falling Out" - Two siblings get into a fight caused by a cramped fallout bunker, lack of food, and a mysterious voice on a radio.

To Apply: 

Please send your headshot, name/age, and short video of you acting (monologue or reel) to Jmajosephson@gmail.com

Filming will take place in South Seattle on May 9 and 10 (all transportation costs will be reimbursed).  Please Note: This is a non-union student film.

Please let me know any questions or if you're interested!

Contact: Jmajosephson@gmail.com

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – Paid Acting Opportunity | Cambridge, MA

 

Hi all! I am casting **3 actors** for a series of short nurse training videos filming on **Friday, May 29th** in Cambridge, MA. All 3 actors are needed for the full day (9:00 AM – 4:00 PM).

 

This is a non-union, paid opportunity. Compensation will be shared upon inquiry. Lunch, snacks, and refreshments will be provided. Transportation costs will not be covered. Prior acting experience is preferred, as there will be no teleprompter on-set and you **must have the ability to memorize lines**.

──────────────────────────

🎭 ROLES WE'RE CASTING - *Ethnicity is open for all roles, age ranges are firm*

──────────────────────────

👩 ACTOR A — Woman, Ages 40–60

Appears in 2 of 3 videos. Will play a nurse (scrubs provided) and a central character in a workplace conflict scenario. Must be comfortable portraying emotional range — including frustration, composure, and resolution. Must bring a business casual outfit for filming.

 

👩 ACTOR B — Woman, Ages 20–30

Appears in all 3 videos. Will play a nurse in two scenarios (scrubs provided) and a business casual office worker in a third. Must bring a business casual outfit for filming.

 

👨 ACTOR C — Man, Ages 25–55

Appears in 2 of 3 videos. Will play a nurse (scrubs provided) and a business casual office worker. Must bring a business casual outfit for filming.

 

──────────────────────────

📋 VIDEO OVERVIEW - *Scripts will be provided in advance so actors can prepare*

──────────────────────────

 

Video 1 (~5 min) — All 3 actors

A workplace conflict between two nurses, followed by a debrief with a colleague, and a resolution. Set in a breakroom/hallway setting. Medical scrubs will be provided to wear.

 

Video 2 (~5 min) — Actors A & B

A nurse delivers difficult news to a patient. Intimate, low-key setting. Requires emotional sensitivity and natural delivery. Medical scrubs will be provided to wear for nurse.

 

Video 3 (~5 min) — Actors B & C

Two coworkers navigate a workplace conflict — filmed three different ways with identical blocking. Business casual attire required to be provided by the actor.

 

──────────────────────────

📩 TO SUBMIT

──────────────────────────

Please email me at carladibiase6@gmail.com with:

 

• Your name

• Age

• Which role you're submitting for

• A recent photo and a reel(s) of acting you have done in the past

• A resume of past experience

 

I will be in touch with those who reach out – thank you!!

items.text:
🚨 EMERGENCY CASTING CALL — ATLANTA 🚨
S.W.A.T.S. — Coming-of-age short film set in Southwest Atlanta. Festival circuit. Two-day shoot: Saturday May 2nd & Sunday May 3rd. Non-union. Copy, credit, meals on set.
We are looking for 4 roles and we need to move FAST.  TERRANCE — Black male, 17-22. Big. Physical. Intimidating presence. The kind of guy who makes a hallway feel smaller when he walks in. But there’s a scene where he sits alone at a kitchen table while his mother walks away and doesn’t look back — and we need THAT guy too. If you can do both, we want to see you.
TERRANCE’S MOTHER — Black female, late 30s. Tired in a way that sleep doesn’t fix. One scene, minimal dialogue, but it carries the whole film on its back. Strong physical actors only — this performance lives in stillness and body language.
MALIKE’S MOTHER — Black female, mid-to-late 30s. Passed out on the couch in her work uniform when her son leaves for school. She loves him. She’s just got nothing left. Mostly non-speaking but your presence is everything.
MS. JOHNSON — Female, 35-55, any ethnicity. The teacher who has seen every trick in the book. Comic authority. Timing matters. Two scenes — the kind of role that gets remembered.

📩 To submit send to koachcarterfilms@gmail.com or DM @koachcarter26
Include: recent photo, name, age, which role, availability for May 2-3, and any reel or experience.
Shoot dates are locked. No flexibility. If you’re serious, move fast.
ATL, let’s go

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL

Purple Dreams Productions are casting the lead character in our upcoming play.

‘MURDER AT…’
There’s a killer in the cast! Comedy turns to tragedy as a murderer reveals themselves… but who will be their first victim?

This play is a psychological drama, based around a cast of actors as they put on a series of plays at their local theatre. 

We have 2 booked dates locked in at different venues, with the potential for more as new bookings come in.

29th May - Murder at the Quay Theatre
13th June - Murder at Cheltenham Playhouse

We’ve previously toured this play in Brentwood, Faversham, Lowestoft, Sittingbourne, Wickenby, Thame and Sleaford to great responses, and are looking forward to taking it to new audiences. 

Rehearsals will take place in Hunstanton (PE36) and will be as flexible as possible to work around previous commitments.

If you’re interested in joining our warm and friendly group, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. Contact me via a DM on here, or at purple-dreams@hotmail.co.uk 

Many thanks 
Tobias Nicholls 
Creative Director 
Purple Dreams Productions

items.text:
Hey everyone!
My name is Sophie and I’m casting for an upcoming indie horror film and looking for two female main characters! 

I am looking for: 

Diane 

- 19-25 age range 

- Ambitious carer character 

- Any appearance welcomed 

- Happy for SFX makeup to be applied 🙂 

Franny

- 19-25 age range 

- Agoraphobic young adult character 

- Any appearance welcomed 

- Happy for SFX makeup to be applied 🙂 

Looking for actresses who would be available within the next few weeks to shoot! On some evenings and in the days! 

I’m looking for people around Colchester/Essex/Elmstead Market! 

Unfortunately, this project has no budget and is a indie collaboration project, therefore only suits actresses who are looking for showreel footage/experience, sorry 😞

It’ll be a really fun horror project, with a hope to submit to festivals! 

Please email sophiebrock3@hotmail.com for more info about the project and with a headshot of yours! 

Thanks again guys!! :)

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL - TRAVEL AND FOOD PAID **

One Day Filming on August 1st - West Yorkshire 

**ROLES (Authentic Yorkshire Accents Required) **

** **

**Cory**

Early 20's, funny, kind, and a beloved friend. But tonight, Cory feels like he doesn't live up to any of those traits. Everyone around him is having a good time, but he's struggling to connect. Nature calls, and Cory's need to use the urinals is stalled by an unashamed, half drunk, local bar fly. 

**‘The Man’**

Only known as 'The Man', probably around 40 to 60 years of age, he's your local pub's number 1 fan. The regulars may describe him as larger than life, or crass and rude, depending on who you ask. The Man finds himself having casual urinal talk to a timid 20 year old just trying to get through the day. 

**Compensation **

Transport and food will be covered. This is a microbudget short film. 

Send your CV/showreel to:* analog.studios@outlook.com*
Subject line: *Urinal Casting*

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Urinal SIGUATIONAL SHORT FILM ABOUT THE FILM Cory, an anxious introvert is left alone in the toilets with a boozed-up bar fly. The only way out is to conquer his stage fright and use the urinal. The pressure is on. ROLES Lead: male, early 20's Support: male, 40's 40's-50's 50's Shoot date: Saturday Ist August'

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL | RUNNERS | S27

We’re casting runners for a photo + video shoot for a major running brand. We need intermediate, advanced, and elite runners age 18+ across all identities. Experience with road running and good running form required. 

Pay is $2,000 for 1 day of work in New York, NY between Thu 5/28 - Wed 6/3 (1 day, TBD) with a fitting on Wed 5/27 or Tue 6/2. Must be 18+ and live in NY. Must disclose your talent agency if applicable. The advertiser’s name will be disclosed prior to booking if you are offered a role. 

We are also casting extras for this project! We need people ages 18-70 across all identities, pay is $500/day. See link for more info! 

TO APPLY:  https://www.weeblemountain.com/opencastingcalls/s27-runners

DON’T FIT THIS ROLE? Sign up for general consideration at https://weeblemountain.com/signup | We specialize in real people casting.

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL / Unpaid / Non-Union**

**Deadline:** May 9 (decisions made on a rolling basis, may close earlier)

Casting for 3 major roles and 2 minor roles for a historical romantic comedy short film, which will be showing at FEST New Directors and Films Festival in Portugal in late June. The film will be submitted to other festivals as opportunities arise.

All actors should be comfortable wearing period dress and delivering elevated / historical dialogue.

Shoot dates are TBD but will be during **mid to late May** in **Steveston, Richmond**. For major roles, in-person availability is also required in **early May** for **costume fittings**, which will be made custom to measurements.

# **Major Roles**

Helewise (lead) — Woman, Mid/Late 20's / European looking

Cozzo (romantic interest) — Man, Late 20's / Early 30's / European looking

Aniel — Man (or masculine presenting) / Open Age and Race 

# **Minor Roles**

Village girl (voice only) — 20's/30's. Youthful sounding. One day only.

Senior Banker — 40's-60's. One day only. Small monologue.

# **Contact:**

**For audition materials please email headshots and a full body slate (unlisted Youtube video preferred) to the following email:** helewiseshortfilm@gmail.com

**Subject line:**

[Your name] - [Role(s) you are auditioning for] - Talent

Example:

John Doe - Aniel, Cozzo - Talent

She is an unwed spinster who has led a life of hardship and meniai labour. Helewise is a quick learner with a voracious appetite for the knowledge, but is held back by her lack of education and inability to read. As 10 years pass, Helewise grows increasingly cyn,cαι and cantakerous, though we still catch glimpses of the joie de νε that initially drew Cozzo to her'

He has a mischevious streak making habit of squirreling contraban books disavowed by the Catholic Papacy for his personal collection. He expressive and personable, but cn be naive or cowardly on accounto of hisprivileged upbringing.'

sharedPost.text:
📢 THE REVOLUTION HAS A NAME: SODIES KASI TV! 🎬🔥
Meadowlands, the wait is over. We aren't just a channel; we are the heartbeat of the 10 Zones. We are the lens of the youth, the voice of the hustle, and the home of the untold story.

⚠️ THE REALITY CHECK (Building from Zero)
We want to be 100% transparent with our community. We are a Grassroots Startup proving that you don't need a million-rand budget to have a billion-rand vision.

NO Professional Tools: We use our smartphones and our brains. 📱🧠

NO Big Budget: We are fueled by pure passion and Kasi discipline. 💸❌

NO Physical Building: The streets of Ndofaya are our studio. 🏘️🛣️
If we can start with nothing, you have no excuse to stay still!

📺 OUR PRODUCTION LINEUP (The Sodies Slate)
We are currently filming and scouting for the following shows:

MEADOWLANDS HEART & THE BLOOD COIN: Our flagship dramas. Raw, high-tension storytelling.

KASI SOUL SESSION: A safe space to vent, confess, or share your "Glow-Up" story. (Anonymity respected).

THE HUSTLE PROFILE: Highlighting the entrepreneurs of the 10 Zones.

JUNIOR QUIZ REVOLUTION: 15 Learners competing for the title of the smartest in the Kasi. 🧠🏆

KASI NEWS & YOUTH VOICE: The headlines that matter to us, by us.

THE STAGE: Showcasing DJs, Producers, Poets, and Dancers. 🎧✍️

🚀 HOW TO JOIN THE MOVEMENT
1. FOR ACTORS & CREW (The Founding 40):
We are looking for raw talent, not just resumes. If you have the heart to build this with us, apply below.
👉 APPLY HERE: [https://form.svhrt.com/69b5fc522ac0ef04c5970eab]

2. FOR THE SOUL SESSION (Vents & Confessions):
To share your story or your "Before & After" Glow-Up, you must follow our professional format.
👉 EMAIL: infosodieskasitv@gmail.com
(Subject: [SOUL SESSION] - Name/Alias - Zone)

3. FOR TALENT & MUSIC (DJs, Producers, Poets):
Want us to feature your craft or use your beats in our soundtracks?
👉 EMAIL: infosodieskasitv@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL!

Hello currently casting for a SAG-AFTRA short film “Let Him Play”

In need of the following roles:

Ryan (18)

Neurodivergent, sensitive, observant, and full

of unexpected wonder. His quirks include

tapping, wiping his nose, headphones on, masking

an extraordinary ear for music that no one has ever nurtured.

Julie (50)

A loving mother suffocated by a

failing marriage. She believes in her

boys but is trapped in survival mode.

Please send headshots and info to [lethimplayinfo@gmail.com](mailto:lethimplayinfo@gmail.com)

And we will send you instructions for self tape!

Shooting near LA in Lancaster June 27th and 28th!

items.text:
ACTING & IMPROV PROGRAM
with Wojciech Medyński

3 months. One group. Real progress.

This is a focused, long-term training for actors and creatives who want to go deeper into the craft.

Not drop-ins. Not surface-level exercises.

A consistent group working week by week on presence, character, and truthful performance.

We use improvisation as a tool to unlock spontaneity, connection, and real reactions on stage.

WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON

On-stage presence and confidence
Character building and objectives
Emotional truth and connection
Listening and reacting in the moment
Improvisation as a foundation for acting
Scene work in pairs and ensemble

WHO THIS IS FOR

Actors, performers, and curious beginners who are ready to commit.

You don’t need experience.
You need willingness to show up and work.

FORMAT

Closed group
Once a week
2 hours per session
3-month program

Small group to keep the work focused and personal.

INSTRUCTOR

Wojciech Medyński

Professional actor working across theatre, film, and television.
Trained at the Łódź Film School.
Experience in Teatr Jaracza and Teatr Syrena in Warsaw.

DETAILS

Atlas Tower, Warsaw
Starts in May

Exact day and time confirmed based on the group.

PRICE

1500 PLN full program
500 PLN monthly option

Limited spots.

If you’re ready to commit and go deeper, join us.

Presented by Impact Warsaw
Perform. Create. Connect.

items.text:
**Sesja zdjęciowa**

Gdzie: **Warszawa**

Kto: **fotograf**

Kogo: **modela**, chłopaka o szczupłej/sportowej sylwetce

Brak wymaganego doświadczenia w pozowaniu, wystarczą chęci

Kiedy: **25 kwiecień 2026 sobota**

**Sesja zdjęciowa na zasadach TFP czyli pozowanie za zdjęcia.**

Do projektu fotograficznego w celu poszerzenia własnego portfolio szukam modela. Tak jak wcześniej pisałem, nie wymagam doświadczenia w pozowaniu. Sesja obejmuje zdjęcia portretowe, sylwetkowe i akty. Miejsce: jedna z warszawskich galerii w okolicy dworca zachodniego. Zależy mi m.in. na pokazaniu emocji całym ciałem. Szczegóły do omówienia w PW. Tylko osoby pełnoletnie.

**PS.** Zdjęcie dla uwagi

DATA: 10/05/2026

MIEJSCE: Warszawa

STAWKA za statystę dorosłego: 110 zł 
dziecko: 130 zł 

ROLE:
1. mężczyzna około 60 lat na rowerze (ze swoim rowerem +60 zł)

2. mężczyźni w garniturach - eleganccy, zadbani, 35 lat

3. mężczyzna około 45 lat z psem typu kundel (za pieska +60 zł) 

4. zakochana para - prawdziwa para, wiek około 35 lat 

ZGŁOSZENIA:
sceneriaagencja@gmail.com
W tytule maila: FH 10/05 + wybrana rola

W treści: imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu, miejsce zamieszkania, wzrost, wymiary: klatka/wzrost/biodra, rozmiar buta, zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki

items.text:
**Looking for a new type of Acting Class?**

Actors based in or near to Manchester, 

Actor and acting coach Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) is now running weekly acting classes in South Manchester. 

Andy’s classes are different from most! Firstly Andy has over 20 years experience in the industry working with some of the biggest Directors and Actors in the business!

Andy’s classes are proactive, on your feet lessons where **Doing** is the done thing! 

 

Andy is also a keen director and film maker bringing that skill set into the lessons means that each monthly block **You walk away with two showreel style quality scenes! **

All for the bargain price of just £85 for four classes! 

Email [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) to book!

items.title: (no title)

sharedPost.text:
🎶🌊 This beautiful and gentle music has chased away all sadness 
❤️ Celebrating 20 years of Shenyun Performing Arts - bringing culture to life on stages around the world.
⚡️⚡️ Only three weeks left until the end of the tour, the countdown has begun. Come see a performance near you before the 2026 season concludes.
🎟️ Choose your best seat here and experience the amazing blend of dance, music, and culture vividly recreated: https://1kb.link/mQhpuy

✨ Don't miss the unique beauty of Shenyun music when the show returns to the stage this season.

LONDON CASTING CALL - PAID 

We are casting Background / Extras for an upcoming production in London on the 18th and 20th of May. 

We are looking for: 
* Male actors
* London based
* Age range 35-45
* South Asian / Indian ethnicity 

If this sounds like you please do get in touch!

items.text:
"I hear you—and this happens to so many experienced actors. You've been out there a while, but now the auditions dried up, your agent's not delivering, and you're stuck. The problem isn't your talent. It's your branding, packaging, and marketing. I've been a working actor for over 40 years and a coach for almost 20. I turn stalled careers into cash-flowing juggernauts again—TV, film, commercials, print, industrials, music videos. You don't need to start over. You need a veteran who speaks the language. Let's hop on a quick consult.

KentKasper.net

topComments.text: Have 4 agents and not one job from them

items.text:
Wir suchen dich! Arktos (m/w/d) !

Das Musical der Schwaben-Bühne e.V. wird im Oktober im alten Kino Bissingen erneut eine Wiederaufnahme spielen.
Nach 10 ausverkauften Vorstellungen soll unser Kinder- und Erwachsenen Musical neuen Flair bekommen und uns in Bissingen eine neue Spielstätte schaffen.

Hast du Lust für den guten Zweck auf die Bühne zu gehen ?
Und das in einem tollen Team?
Dann melde dich einfach bei uns ! 
Tabaluga-schwabenbuehne@gmx.de 
Wir freuen uns auf dich!

items.text:
Mutige Darsteller/in in Düsseldorf und Umgebung gesucht 🎞🎥

Das wohl mutigste Kurzfilm Projekt steht uns bevor! 

Dazu werden noch Schauspieler und Komparsen gesucht! 🫵 (m/w/d)
Hast du Lust vor der Kamera zu stehen und kein Problem "Preußen" in die Welt zu rufen, dann bist du hier genau richtig!

🔲 Wann? Mai/Juni 2026
🔲 Wo? Raum Düsseldorf 
🔲 Gage? No Budget 

Die gemachten Aufnahmen dürfen für's persönliche Showreel frei genutzt werden. Für Verpflegung 🥘 ist gesorgt. Gage kann leider nicht gezahlt werden.

Ziel ist es einen modernen Kurzfilm in höchster Kinoqualität zu produzieren 💪

Bewerbung, bitte mit Infos (Alter, Schauspielerfahrung,...) und zwei Fotos als PN an mich!

Danke und viel Erfolg!
Aus Rheinprovinz

Looking for a talented and good-looking model/actress for a one-day music video shoot on 4th May.

If you’re interested or know someone who’d be a great fit, DM me ASAP or text 07887172863.

items.text:
CASTING CALL! 🏀 

Wings Theatre School is on the lookout for two musical theatre performers aged 11-18 to take on these iconic roles in our upcoming production of High School Musical Jr. at The Assembly Rooms, Tamworth this August!

We are on the look out for:

Troy Bolton – the charismatic basketball star with a passion for singing. Strong vocals, natural stage presence and dance technique.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM (LONDON, UNPAID)**

We’re casting for *“Jumpers for Goalposts,”* a coming-of-age short film at the London College of Communication.

**Logline:**
A London-set story exploring masculinity and body image within a local football team.

**SHOOT DATES:**
May 5th–12th (exact dates vary by role)

**LOCATION:** London (football ground + interior location)

ROLES:

**ROBBIE (Lead)**
Male, 17–23
A bench player struggling with body image and masculinity. Stocky build.
*White / European descent. Previous acting experience preferred.*

**CLIVE (Supporting)**
Male, 35–60
A local football coach. Informal, crass, blunt.
*Previous acting experience preferred.*

**MUM (Supporting)**
Female, 35–60
Robbie's mum. Caring and affectionate, close with Robbie.
*White / European descent. Previous acting experience preferred.*

**COLE (Supporting)**
Male, 17–23
The team’s best player. Confident, obnoxious, antagonistic toward Robbie.
*Previous acting experience preferred.*

**FOOTBALL PLAYERS (Extras)**
Male, 17–25
Background players on the team. No acting experience required.

TO APPLY:

Please send an email to jumpersforgoalpostsfilm@outlook.com with your name, headshot, CV, and any showreels if applicable.

items.text:
CASTING CALL - “The Sins of Our Father” - NON-UNION

Hi All! We're almost done casting for "The Sins of Our Father", but we're just missing our three main characters younger selves.

Maddie: 14 years, white, women-presenting. **Analytical. Caring. Avoidant.**

Leland: 10-12 years, white, male-presenting. **Free-spirited. Lax. Unbothered.**
Julian: 5-8 years, white, male presenting. **Geeky. Sentimental. Quick-witted.**

Filming will be taking place mid May to mid August, and each character is only needed for 1-3 scenes, in the greater Vancouver area. It is a volunteer project (with IMDb credit, meals provided, copy, and great company).

If your kid is interested in being apart of this amazing project please email their headshot and the name of the character they're auditioning for to thesinsofourfatherfilm@gmail.com by Friday May 1st.

items.text:
Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

Marcin Pawlicki (39) – prywatny detektyw - inteligentny, schludny, ale trochę „po przejściach”, niezależny typ. Powinien mieć wiarygodny vibe prywatnego detektywa: laptop, telefon, auto, lekkie nerwy. 

Data: 07. i 08. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania pilnych zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

URGENT CASTING: Talent with REAL golf skills for Major Retail Brand Spot
Shoot Date: 5/3–5/6 (TBD how many days based on role.)

Location: Los Angeles, CA

Rate: $500 x Day + $2,000 usage

Non-union

GOLFER (Male)

Ages (26-38)

Preferably Caucasian

Height: 5’10-6'2

Size: M/L

We’re specifically looking for talent with golf skills, as golf performance will be featured in the spot. The campaign will run across broadcast, streaming, social, and will also include a photography component.

If you’re interested send self tapes of your driving swing & a putt, any portfolio images you may have full body & headshots. As well your sizing (Shirt M/L, Waist/inseam, shoe size, height & weight.) Email: allison.trimbell.dcsg@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL – “WINNER WINNER” (WORKING TITLE) – INDIE SHORT FILM (LONDON)
We’re casting for an upcoming independent short film shooting in and around London.

🎬 SHOOT DETAILS

• Location: London (various locations in and around the city)

• Dates: Late summer (exact dates TBC)

• Shoot Length: 4 days

💡 PROJECT INFO

This is a low-budget indie production with a strong focus on character and performance. The film blends the tone of 1980s comedies with early 2000s crime films, drawing inspiration from titles like Good Time, Uncut Gems, Heat, Collateral, and The Sopranos. It is intended for festival submission.

🎭 ROLES

We are currently casting four key roles:

• Billy – Mid 20s to early 30s. Homeless. Reactive, impulsive, not a criminal — just unlucky. A chaotic but sympathetic character at the heart of the story.

• Andy – 45–60. Old-school gangster. Controlled but volatile, obsessed with power. Carries authority and underlying menace.

• Jonah – Early to mid 30s. Young, aggressive, and eager to prove himself. Craves approval, ambitious, but not quite as sharp as he believes.

• Max – 10–13. Observant, cunning, and intelligent with a mischievous edge. A sharp kid who’s always watching and thinking.

We’re particularly interested in actors who enjoy indie, character-driven work and are looking to build experience and credits.

💰 PAY & SUPPORT

• Paid (low-budget rates)

• Travel expenses covered

• Costumes provided

This is a great opportunity to be part of a creative, collaborative project and gain festival exposure.

📩 TO APPLY

Please send:

• Headshot

• CV / Spotlight link (if available)

• Showreel (if available)

Email: kentledger100@gmail.com

We’d love to hear from you — feel free to reach out with any questions and tell us a bit about yourself. Looking forward to connecting!

items.text: I'm a performance coach with 20+ years in film and television working with young actors and their families. I'm here to share knowledge, answer questions, and connect with parents navigating this industry.

items.text:
Has your child appeared in a TV show? If yes then your voice matters more than ever. The TV Industry Human Rights Forum needs you and your perspectives for an important project on children's rights. Behind every young performer is a parent navigating unique opportunities, challenges, and decisions—and your experience can help shape a better future for families just like yours. Please complete this confidential survey and share it with others in your networks. You’ll be contributing valuable insights that can improve support systems, working conditions, and overall wellbeing for children on TV productions. Follow the survey link for more information about the project.

https://form.typeform.com/to/CMmqr4bD

SURVEY CLOSES MIDNIGHT TONIGHT!!

items.text:
BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED - NON UNION CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for **NON UNION ACTORS **to be *background cast* in our project which will be filming on **MAY 20. **Exact call times for background cast is TBD however, we would need you to keep your entire day available until the exact times are confirmed.

The background cast are bar patrons who are seated in the bar. 

The background we are looking for:

-any ethnicity

-non-union

-available all day on May 20th 2026

The deadline for submissions to our email is **May 04** **2026** @ 11:59PM.

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to go method. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

Please provide your introduction of who you are, headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email.

Please send your information to our email: **methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com **and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please note that this set will be **unpaid** however, crafty will be on set. You are still expected to bring your own lunch as crafty is not substitute for a meal. We hope to hear from you :)

The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to go method. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

Please provide your introduction of who you are, headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email.

Please send your information to our email: **methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com **and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please note that this set will be **unpaid** however, crafty will be on set. You are still expected to bring your own lunch as crafty is not substitute for a meal. We hope to hear from you :)

We’re currently casting for a Kickstarter commercial shoot and looking for:

• Male talent (right-handed preferred)

• Comfortable working with hands-on tools on camera

• Natural, confident presence on screen

📅 Shoot date: May 6

⏱ Duration: Full day (approx. 8 hours)

💰 Rate: $300/day

⸻

Project details:

We’ll be filming a craft cutting tool used for precise, hands-on work (cutting materials like leather, wood, etc.).

This is a hands-focused shoot, so it’s important that you feel comfortable performing simple cutting actions on camera.

📩 How to apply:

items.text:
Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

Marcin Pawlicki (39) – prywatny detektyw - inteligentny, schludny, ale trochę „po przejściach”, niezależny typ. Powinien mieć wiarygodny vibe prywatnego detektywa: laptop, telefon, auto, lekkie nerwy. 

Data: 07. i 08. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania pilnych zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**30 kwietnia (czwartek)**

** **

*Proszę o nie zgłaszanie się panów, którzy już wysłali zgłoszenie*.

** **

Doszukujemy jeszcze panów na plan filmu "Kosmonauta" na 30.04. Wiek od 18 lat w górę bez ograniczeń.

 

**Stawka 200 zł gotówką po planie (dzień zdjęciowy 130 zł + charakteryzacja 70 zł)**

** **

Charakteryzacja dzisiaj 27.04 i jutro 28.04. Na strzyżenie są zapraszane tylko wybrane osoby.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS 30**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie) i sylwetki: TYLKO Z DNIA ZGŁOSZENIA + zdjęcie z profilu**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

@wszyscy

items.summary:
**WARSZAWA**

**30 kwietnia (czwartek)**

** **

*Proszę o nie zgłaszanie się panów, którzy już wysłali zgłoszenie*.

** **

Doszukujemy jeszcze panów na plan filmu "Kosmonauta" na 30.04. Wiek od 18 lat w górę bez ograniczeń.

 

**Stawka 200 zł gotówką po planie (dzień zdjęciowy 130 zł + charakteryzacja 70 zł)**

** **

Charakteryzacja dzisiaj 27.04 i jutro 28.04. Na strzyżenie są zapraszane tylko wybrane osoby.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS 30**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie) i sylwetki: TYLKO Z DNIA ZGŁOSZENIA + zdjęcie z profilu**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

@wszyscy
items.title: **WARSZAWA**

items.text:
WARSZAWA 30.04.2026r.
REKLAMA SIECI SKLEPÓW SPOŻYWCZYCH

Zgłoszenia przyjmuję do czwartku 23.04 do końca dnia.

SZUKAMY:
- Mężczyzna, aktor - w wieku 28-36 - typ śmiesznego ziomka - rola mówiona.
- Musisz mieć komediowy sznyt. Chętnie coś charakterystycznego w urodzie.

TERMINY:
- 28 lub 29.04.2026 Przymiarki (dokładny dzień zostanie potwierdzony)
- 30.04.2026 ZDJĘCIA W WARSZAWIE

STAWKA:
Stawka: 1500 dzień zdjęciowy + 8000 prawa (12 miesięcy - all media)

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl 
W tytule maila: R30 
Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wizytówkę jako link do YT, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki.

W odpowiedzi na wybrane zgłoszenia prześlę scenkę do nagrania, prawa oraz link do formularza.

Do zobaczenia na planie!

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'WARSZAWA 28-30.04.2026r. SZUKAMY: Mężczyzna, aktor w wieku 28-36 typ śmiesznego ziomka rola mówiona. •Musisz mieć komediowy sznyt. Chętnie coś charakterystycznego w urodzie. TERMINY: 28 lub 29.04.2026 Przymiarki (dokładny dzień zostanie potwierdzony) 30.04.2026 ZDJĘCIA w WARSZAWIE (12 Stawka: 1500 dzień zdjęciowy all media) miesięcy 8000 prawa Zgłoszenia: imię i nazwisko, wizytówka, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. PODI TYTUŁEM agata@podtytulem.pl'

Le 7 février 2025, le groupe Facebook “Casting, les annonces”, qui comptait 70 438 membres, a été désactivé par l’IA de Facebook.
Voici le nouveau groupe pour celles et ceux qui ne le savent pas encore.
On ne va quand même pas se laisser faire par l’IA… 😉

Tout le monde en parle

items.text:
CASTING CALL/ "Million Dollar Personality Girl" Short
>>CASTING CALL <<

We are SEEKING an actor with phenomenal range for upcoming ARTISTIC, 1930s based short “MDPG” that is shooting this summer 🎥

AMAZING opportunity to depict the 1930s BLACK HOLLYWOOD LEGEND, in a way never seen before--

BILL “BOJANGLES” ROBINSON 

(40s - 60s, African American, Male)

Legendary tap dancer whose success can’t  protect him from the era’s prejudices.  

CONCEPT:

He has a brief yet insightful conversation discussing black artists navigating 1930s Hollywood, with Jeni Le Gon, the first African American woman to sign a long-term contract with a major studio. 

-------------------------------

--TWO DAY WEEKEND SHOOT, filming this summer, August 2026

--ONE Location

--$450 flat rate/ IMBD Credit/ Meal & Reel

*Bonus if Tap Dancer, very light moves/ routine, this role is more centered for an ACTOR. 

*UNIQUE opportunity to SHINE in this role and demonstrate your ability 

-Location: Los Angeles, CA

-Must be LA-based

-$450 flat rate/ IMBD Credit/ Meal & Reel

-GENRE: DRAMA

-Film dates : August 2026, TBD

.

.

.

Please let me know if you’re interested!🙏🏾✨

.
.

Send Headshot/Resume/Reel to email below, titled “BILL SUBMISSION” in the subject.
.

.

.

NatDorcia94@gmail.com

Any Suggestions/ Recommendations are always greatly appreciated 🎥✨
